reason: Verified that agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully with agent sidebar visible
Found and clicked on "QA-20260319-180410-pneg" agent in sidebar - Agent detail page opened, status shown as "idle"
Verified agent status is "idle" - Confirmed status displayed as "idle" in header
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message submitted successfully, agent status changed to "working"
Account access request card appeared asking for GitHub account access - Card displayed with checkbox for GitHub account and "Grant Access" button
Selected GitHub account by clicking checkbox - Checkbox became checked, "Grant Access (1)" button enabled
Clicked "Grant Access" button - Agent resumed processing with status "working"
Waited up to 4 minutes for response - Agent completed processing in 1 minute 33 seconds and returned to "idle" status
Verified response includes GitHub username - Response clearly shows "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
Captured screenshot - Full page screenshot saved showing the complete conversation flow and final GitHub username response
